Careers

At Beau’s, our team is united by passion and a love of craft beer. We strive to elevate the human spirit and provide an amazing experience for all our craft-beer loving friends every day.

Beau’s is an equal opportunity employer, and we value diversity and inclusion in our brewery. We promise to consider all qualified applicants for employment without regard to race, colour, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, or any other legally protected factors.

We are also able to provide accessibility accommodation during the recruitment process – just let us know with an email to careers@beaus.ca, and we’ll work with you to make sure your needs are met.
